header_subtitle: Changes are saved automatically. Reload the page for them to take effect.
language_hint: Language of the settings page and side panel UI.
scope_hint_html: One entry per line. Use a domain alone for an entire site, or append a path prefix after the domain to match only that section. Subdomains match automatically; * wildcards work in domains and paths.
scope_examples_html:
Examples
  • example.com — whole site (every path on that domain)
  • example.com/admin — only /admin and sub-paths (e.g. /admin/users)
  • news.example.com/blog — blog section on one subdomain
  • *shop* — any host name containing shop
Path rules ignore query strings and # fragments. /admin does not match /administrator.
mode_blacklist: Blacklist (enabled on sites not in the list)
mode_whitelist: Whitelist (enabled only on sites in the list)
scope_whitelist_recommended_html: Tip: For tighter control, choose whitelist mode above — the Side Panel only activates on sites you list, so it won't open where you don't need it.
scope_shortcut_bypass_html: The keyboard shortcut and toolbar icon can still open the Side Panel on the current tab even when Scope would block automatic link previews — that is intentional so you can explicitly mirror this page.
trigger_click_note_html: Want a link to skip the Side Panel? Hold ⌘ / Ctrl for a new tab, ⇧ for a new window, or ⌥ Option / Alt to open in the current tab. To always skip a page or whole site, add its domain or path prefix under Scope above.
link_scope_hint_html: By default, eligible outgoing links — including same-tab links and links that open in a new tab — open in the side panel. Uncheck the option below to intercept only new-tab links and leave same-tab navigation to the browser.
link_scope_include_nonblank: Also open links that don't open in a new tab in the side panel
open_trigger_label: How links open in the Side Panel
open_trigger_click_hint_html: Left click opens eligible links in the Side Panel. Turn on Also preview on hover below to preview on hover without changing click behavior.
open_trigger_middle_hint_html: Only middle-click (scroll-wheel click) on a link opens the Side Panel. Left click keeps the browser's normal behavior — same tab, new tab, or download as the page intended.
open_trigger_hover_hint_html: Left click no longer opens the Side Panel — only hovering does, after the delay below. Open the panel once per tab first (toolbar icon or Alt+Shift+P); then pin it and hover through links.
settings_conflict_notice: Settings were updated in another tab or device; showing the latest.
reset_confirm: Reset to defaults? Blacklist and whitelist entries will be cleared.
btn_quick_blacklist_title: Don't use side panel on this site
btn_quick_blacklist_already_title: This page already matches the blacklist
sidepanel_welcome_body: Click any link on the left and it opens here, side-by-side.
sidepanel_welcome_pin_html: Tip: click the pin icon at the top-right of this panel so it stays open when you switch tabs.
sidepanel_welcome_bypass_html: Hold <kbd>⌘</kbd> / <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> to open a new tab, or <kbd>⌥</kbd> Option / <kbd>Alt</kbd> to open in the current tab — both bypass the Side Panel.
sidepanel_welcome_open_main_html: Tip: click the ← button in the toolbar to open the current preview in the left tab and close this panel.
sidepanel_blocked_body_html: This site's security policy (X-Frame-Options / CSP) blocks embedding in an iframe.
sidepanel_blocked_note: This restriction is set by the site itself — not by the extension.
sidepanel_blocked_open_blacklist: Open in new tab & add to blacklist
sidepanel_blocked_open_blacklist_done: Added to blacklist — opened in new tab
sidepanel_blocked_probe_timeout: Preview iframe did not finish loading in time (page scripts never confirmed).
sidepanel_blocked_probe_redirect: HTTP redirect ({detail}) — the destination may refuse embedding.
sidepanel_blocked_probe_meta_csp: CSP frame-ancestors in a <meta> tag: {detail} (not removed by the extension).
sidepanel_blocked_probe_js_bust: JavaScript frame-busting detected in page source.
sidepanel_blocked_probe_cookie_likely: Possible session or third-party cookie requirement — may work in a tab but not in an iframe.
sidepanel_blocked_probe_unknown: No explicit X-Frame-Options / CSP found — the site may block via JavaScript.
storage_quota_warning: Domain list is too long for Chrome sync storage. Please shorten it.
